draft_activation_preconditions: Route the pack truthfully through PLANS.md, the canonical gate map, this leaves ledger, and the execution log before Gate 242 work begins.
Reread the canonical vocabulary file before editing any durable field, class, or gate naming.
Bootstrap the repo-local environment via make install / uv sync --extra dev while honouring pyproject.toml.
If sandbox dependency resolution fails later, use the operator-supplied dependency bundle and attached bootstrap instructions instead of changing repo dependency law.
notes: The pack is closed through Gate 246 in the uploaded workspace copy.
No active pack is currently routed.
Git branch metadata remains unavailable in the uploaded zip worktree; execution receipts are command/file based.

Do not claim this pack is active before the quartet moves together.
